section.heading: Examinations for merchant mariner credentials

subsection.heading: Requirement for Sample Exams.—
subsection.content: The Secretary shall develop a sample merchant mariner credential examination and outline of merchant mariner examination topics on an annual basis.

subsection.heading: Public Availability.—
subsection.content: Each sample examination and outline of topics developed under subsection (a) shall be readily available to the public.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 114–120, title III, § 315(b)(1), Feb. 8, 2016, 130 Stat. 62; amended Pub. L. 119–60, div. G, title LXXIII, § 7301(c), Dec. 18, 2025, 139 Stat. 1753.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2025—Subsec. (c). Pub. L. 119–60 struck out subsec. (c). Text read as follows: “In this section, the term ‘merchant mariner credential’ has the meaning that term has in section 7510.”
